title: One Project Board on Multiple Portfolios
excerpt:

Add a single project board to multiple portfolios for different levels of roll-ups.

posts.author: xsarahwong (Sarah Wong)
posts.cookedHtml:
Request
Add a single project board to multiple portfolios for different levels of roll-ups.

Use Case
We have corporate goals as well as department goals. Each department needs to track their year-round projects in their own workspace. Some of these projects also contribute to the corporate goals so the project board needs to live in the corporate and department world.

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml: The app Rollup Multiple Boards support detail (project) boards aggregating data to multiple master (portfolio) boards

posts.author: brooks (Brooks Williams)
posts.cookedHtml: Similar to the original request, we have multiple levels of organization, each requiring Portfolio-level management. It would be extremely helpful to be able to link a Project board to more than one Portfolio.

posts.author: MRad (M Rad)
posts.cookedHtml: Agree, we have folks that provide services across portfolios. While the one-to-one relationship serves managers with discrete project allocations, we want to be able to utilised portfolio capabilities for those working across teams

posts.author: WirkKarl (Karl)
posts.cookedHtml:
We have both corporate and departmental goals. Each department tracks their ongoing projects within their own workspace. However, some of these projects also contribute to overarching corporate goals.
To avoid duplicating boards, we’d like to have a single project board appear in both the department portfolio and the corporate portfolio — enabling different levels of roll-ups and visibility across the organization.
Is there a way to achieve this within Monday? Or is this a feature currently under consideration?
Thanks!
